---
title: "Onshore Grid Connection"
---

## Role in the Value Chain

The onshore grid connection receives exported HVDC power and converts it to AC at the national high-voltage grid interface.

## Cost Model

The current source material includes onshore conversion in the electrical value chain, but does not yet separate a detailed onshore converter station CAPEX from the broader HVDC station package.

## Energy Balance

The onshore conversion stage is included in the electrical efficiency chain. The specific efficiency value is marked as to be confirmed in the current source table.

## Availability

| Component | Availability |
|---|---:|
| Onshore substation | 98.0% |

## Source Status

This page needs a final split between offshore converter, export cable, onshore converter, and grid interface costs once the HVDC source package is decomposed.
